resources.string: You clicked agree. We actually read it.
Capturing the screen on your device to summarize it. Nothing but the summary ever leaves your phone.
Tap the bubble on a Terms or Privacy screen to summarize it.
Lets T&C Lawyered scroll a Terms or Privacy page for you so it can read the whole thing. It only scrolls when you tap the bubble, and never reads or stores screen content on its own.
